x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
EasyAF 3.0 CLI Tools.
By CloudNimble. https://nimbleapps.cloud

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: Connection string source (e.g., 'appsettings.json:ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection') or actual connection string

options.name: --dbcontext-namespace
options.description: Namespace for generated DbContext (defaults to .Data project namespace)

options.name: --no-data-annotations
options.description: Use fluent API instead of data annotations

options.name: --objects-namespace
options.description: Namespace for generated entity objects (defaults to .Core project namespace)

options.name: --tables
options.description: Specific tables to include (if not specified, all tables will be included)

options.name: --simplemessagebus-project
options.description: Optional SimpleMessageBus project name to create (e.g., 'MyApp.EventBus' or 'MyApp.SimpleMessageBus')

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Set up local development environment for existing EasyAF project

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: Local connection string to store in user secrets

options.name: --context-name
options.description: DbContext class name (if multiple contexts exist)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be configured without making changes

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Clean up build artifacts (bin, obj, TestResults directories) and packages.lock.json files

options.name: --path
options.description: Root directory to clean (defaults to current directory)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be deleted without actually deleting anything

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Run code generation for a given EasyAF component.

options.name: --path
options.description: Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to current directory.

options.name: -dontdelete
options.description: A directory that will be ignored when deleting files.

options.name: -notpublic
options.description: A comma-separated list of table names to ignore when generating the public API surface.

arguments.name: Component
arguments.description: The component to generate. Available options: business, core, data, api, simplemessagebus, all

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate EDMX files from database using existing configuration. If no context name is specified, processes all .edmx.config files found.

options.name: --context-name
options.description: DbContext class name (used to locate {ContextName}.edmx.config file). If not specified, all .edmx.config files will be processed.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the project directory (defaults to auto-detected .Data folder)

commands.name: refresh
commands.description: Refresh existing EDMX files from the database. If no context name is specified, processes all .edmx files found.

options.name: --context-name
options.description: DbContext class name (used to locate {ContextName}.edmx and {ContextName}.edmx.config files). If not specified, all .edmx files will be processed.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the project directory (defaults to auto-detected .Data folder)

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate an EDMX file from an EF Core DbContext in the Data project.

options.name: -path
options.description: Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to current directory.

options.name: --environment
options.description: The environment to use (Development, Production, etc).

options.name: --project
options.description: The project folder containing the DbContext.

commands.name: swap
commands.description: Switch the Provider in the EDMX file between the System.Data.SqlClient & Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.

options.name: -path
options.description: Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to current directory.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watch EDMX files in your Data project for changes and regenerate the Framework.

options.name: -path
options.description: Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to current directory.
